ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Employee's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Employee's last name */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Employee's age */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Employee's sex (M/F) */,
  "employee_title" TEXT /* Title held by the employee within the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the employee works */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Performance target set for the employee */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus amount that can be earned by the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the employee resides */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (full-time, part-time, contract) */,
  "employment_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started working */,
  "leave_balance" INTEGER /* Number of leave days available to the employee */,
  " NOTICE_PERIOD" INTEGER /* Number of days required for notice period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department within the organization */,
  "headquarter_location" TEXT /* Location of the department headquarter */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the department was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance target */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the target is assigned to */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance target */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Value associated with the target */,
  "target_period" TEXT /* Time period for the target (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the target will be evaluated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the target (active, completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_targets_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bonuses" (
  "bonus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bonus record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who received the bonus */,
  "bonus_description" TEXT /* Description of the bonus */,
  "bonus_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bonus */,
  "bonus_date" TEXT /* Date the bonus was awarded */,
  "bonus_type" TEXT /* Type of bonus (performance-based, holiday, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bonus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonuses_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Manager's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Manager's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with the address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the employee */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the employee resides */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the employee's address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (home, office, temporary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with the salary record */,
  "base_salary" REAL /* Base salary of the employee */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus amount linked to the salary record */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date for the salary record */,
  "salary_type" TEXT /* Type of salary (hourly, monthly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the title (e.g., Manager, Sales) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the title */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Grade level of the title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments_info" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department (foreign key) */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated for the department */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit made by the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_credentials" (
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credential record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with the credential */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the employee's account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the employee's account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the employee's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credential_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_credentials_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_performance" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance evaluation */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the employee */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "evaluation_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who received the training */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the training was conducted */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (health, dental, vision) */,
  "coverage_amount" REAL /* Amount of coverage */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_off_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time off request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time off */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time off */,
  "number_of_days" INTEGER /* Number of days requested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (approved, rejected, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_off_requests_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("id")
)
